title: FoxPets
description: Plugin for adding taming of fox
body: FoxPet is a lightweight plugin that lets you tame wild foxes using sweet berries, turning them into loyal companions. Once tamed, your fox will follow you wherever you go, teleporting if it gets too far behind. Unlike vanilla foxes, these pets stay alert at all times—they never sit or sleep, making them perfect adventuring partners. Your fox will also protect you by automatically attacking hostile mobs like zombies and creepers that get too close. With immersive particles and sound effects for taming, combat, and teleportation, the plugin adds lively visual feedback to every interaction. Use the simple /callfox command to instantly summon all your tamed foxes to your location. Best of all, fox ownership persists through server restarts, so your furry friends remain yours forever. Designed for seamless survival gameplay, FoxPet enhances your Minecraft experience with smart, low-maintenance pets that balance fun and functionality.
